title: Unpinned workflow action or floating container tag

execution.limitation: The mutable reference remains an inert fixture and is never pulled, executed, or exposed to GitHub Actions discovery.

prohibited_actions: pull or deploy the floating image

preconditions: Create a non-executable workflow fixture excluded from Actions discovery
Capture a pinned commit-SHA and image-digest baseline
baseline: Run supply-chain policy against compliant fixtures
injection: Use actions/checkout@main or an image :latest only in the fixture

expected.observation: A fixture references mutable software supply-chain coordinates.

remediation: Replace the action with a full commit SHA and image with sha256 digest
retest: Require the remediated fixture to pass
Require deliberately negative regression fixture to fail
cleanup: Verify no workflow run was created
Retain only inert fixtures under the test path
